title: Phase 1a — Database Foundation & Migrations
body:
Core schema for the entire platform. Must be merged before any other Phase 1 ticket.

## Tasks

- [ ] Migration: `users` — UUID PK, `name`, `email`, `password`, `status` (pending/active), `two_factor_secret`, `two_factor_recovery_codes`, `email_verified_at`, `remember_token` — **no `company_id`**
- [ ] Migration: `companies` — UUID PK, `name`, `email`, `phone`, `industry`, `timezone`, `currency`, `date_format`, `logo`, `is_active`, `subscription_plan`, `trial_ends_at`
- [ ] Migration: `company_memberships` — `user_id` (FK), `company_id` (FK), `status` (pending/active), `invite_token`, `invite_expires_at`, `accepted_at`; unique(`user_id`, `company_id`)
- [ ] Migration: `system_admins` — UUID PK, `name`, `email`, `password`
- [ ] Migration: `personal_access_tokens` — Sanctum table (created now; API is Phase 3)
- [ ] Add `HasUuids` trait to every model; all foreign keys use `foreignUuid()`
- [ ] Install `spatie/laravel-permission` — enable **teams** feature in `config/permission.php`, set `column_type` to `uuid` before running migration; add `HasRoles` to `User` model
- [ ] Seeder: roles (`super_admin`, `hr_manager`, `department_manager`, `employee`), one `system_admins` record, one demo company, one demo `super_admin` membership
- [ ] `CompanyScope` global Eloquent scope — reads `session('active_company_id')`, applies `WHERE company_id = ?` on all tenant models
- [ ] `SetActiveCompany` middleware — resolves active company from session on every authenticated request; aborts 403 if user has no membership for that company
- [ ] Spatie `setPermissionsTeamId(company_id)` called on login and company switch

## Key files

- `database/migrations/`
- `database/seeders/DatabaseSeeder.php`
- `app/Models/User.php`, `app/Models/Company.php`, `app/Models/CompanyMembership.php`
- `app/Http/Middleware/SetActiveCompany.php`
- `config/permission.php`

title: Phase 1a — Registration & Onboarding Flow
body:
User registers an account only — no company created at registration. After login, users choose to create or join a company.

## Tasks

- [ ] `POST /register` — creates `users` record only (status: active); no company, no role yet
- [ ] `/onboarding` page shown after registration and on every login when user has no active company membership
- [ ] Onboarding: two options — **"Create a company"** (free in Phase 1; subscription gated in Phase 2) and **"Join a company"** (enter invite code)
- [ ] Company creation form: name, industry, timezone, currency → creates `companies` record + `company_memberships` (active) + assigns `super_admin` role for this company via Spatie teams
- [ ] Redirect to onboarding wizard (`/company/setup`) after first company creation

## Key files

- `app/Http/Controllers/Auth/RegisterController.php`
- `app/Http/Controllers/OnboardingController.php`

title: Phase 1a — Login, Lockout & Company Switcher
body:
Login with lockout protection and company-switching for multi-company users.

## Tasks

- [ ] `POST /login` — validates credentials via `Auth::attempt()`; 5 failed attempts → 15-minute lockout per email using Laravel `RateLimiter`
- [ ] On success: if user has no active membership → `/onboarding`; if one company → set session, redirect `/dashboard`; if multiple companies → show company picker
- [ ] Company switcher nav component — lists all active memberships; switching updates `session('active_company_id')` and calls `setPermissionsTeamId()`; redirects to `/dashboard`
- [ ] Remember-me via `remember_token` (30-day cookie)
- [ ] Logout: invalidate session, redirect to `/login`
- [ ] System admin separate login at `/sysadmin/login` using `system_admin` guard against `system_admins` table
- [ ] `guest` middleware on all auth routes; `auth` middleware on all tenant routes

## Key files

- `app/Http/Controllers/Auth/LoginController.php`
- `app/Http/Controllers/Auth/SystemAdminLoginController.php`

title: Phase 1a — Password Reset & 2FA
body:
Password recovery and optional TOTP two-factor authentication for elevated roles.

## Tasks

**Password Reset**
- [ ] Forgot password: email input → token stored in `password_reset_tokens` → signed link emailed; TTL 60 min, single-use
- [ ] Reset password: validate token → new password form → update password → invalidate all sessions → redirect to login

**2FA (TOTP)**
- [ ] Enable 2FA in profile settings (available to `super_admin` and `hr_manager`)
- [ ] Generate TOTP secret → display QR code for authenticator app → user verifies with current code
- [ ] Store 8 single-use backup codes (hashed) on enable
- [ ] On subsequent login: after password → TOTP challenge screen
- [ ] Disable 2FA: confirm with current TOTP code or backup code

## Key files

- `app/Http/Controllers/Auth/ForgotPasswordController.php`
- `app/Http/Controllers/Auth/TwoFactorController.php`

title: Phase 1a — Employee Invite Flow
body:
When HR creates an employee, the system checks for an existing account and handles both cases cleanly.

## Tasks

- [ ] On employee creation: check `users` table for entered email
- [ ] **Email exists** → create `employees` record + `company_memberships` (pending) → send "invited to join [Company]" notification with signed accept link
- [ ] **Email does not exist** → create `users` (status: pending) + `employees` + `company_memberships` (pending) → send invite email with set-password link
- [ ] Accept link handler: validates signed token, activates `users.status` + `company_memberships.status`, assigns `employee` role via Spatie (scoped to this company)
- [ ] Invite token expires in 48 hours; resend invite action available on employee profile

## Key files

- `app/Http/Controllers/Auth/InviteController.php`
- `app/Notifications/EmployeeInviteNotification.php`
- `routes/web.php`

title: Phase 1a — Auth Email Templates
body:
Branded email templates for every auth notification.

## Tasks

- [ ] `resources/views/emails/layout.blade.php` — shared wrapper: logo, content slot, footer; inline CSS only; mobile-responsive single-column
- [ ] Welcome email: subject `Welcome to Workforce OS, {name}`; CTA → login
- [ ] Password reset email: subject `Reset your Workforce OS password`; CTA → reset link (60 min expiry)
- [ ] Employee invite (new user): subject `{inviter} has invited you to join {company} on Workforce OS`; CTA → set-password link (48 hr expiry)
- [ ] Employee invite (existing user): subject `You've been added to {company} on Workforce OS`; CTA → accept link

## Key files

- `resources/views/emails/layout.blade.php`
- `resources/views/emails/auth/`
- `app/Mail/Auth/`

title: Phase 1a — UI: Auth Pages
body:
All public-facing authentication Blade views. No authenticated layout — uses `layouts/auth.blade.php`.

## Tasks

- [ ] `layouts/auth.blade.php` — centered card layout, logo top-center, `@yield('content')`, flash message area, mobile-responsive (max-width 420px)
- [ ] `auth/login.blade.php` — email, password (show/hide toggle), remember-me checkbox, "Forgot password?" link, loading state on submit, lockout message when rate-limited
- [ ] `auth/register.blade.php` — name, email, password (show/hide + strength indicator), confirm password, ToS checkbox
- [ ] `auth/forgot-password.blade.php` — email field; success state replaces form with generic confirmation (no email enumeration)
- [ ] `auth/reset-password.blade.php` — new password + confirm; invalid/expired token shows clear error with re-request link
- [ ] `auth/two-factor.blade.php` — 6-digit TOTP code input; "Use a backup code" link
- [ ] `onboarding/index.blade.php` — two large CTA cards: "Create a company" and "Join a company" (invite code input); shown after registration and on login when no active membership
- [ ] `onboarding/create-company.blade.php` — company name, industry (select), timezone, currency; step 1 of the setup wizard
- [ ] `sysadmin/login.blade.php` — separate login form for system admins

## Key files

- `resources/views/layouts/auth.blade.php`
- `resources/views/auth/`
- `resources/views/onboarding/`
- `resources/views/sysadmin/`

title: Phase 1a — UI: App Shell & Navigation
body:
The main authenticated layout shared by every post-login page. All other UI issues depend on this.

## Tasks

- [ ] `layouts/app.blade.php` — sidebar + topbar shell; `@yield('content')` main area; `@stack('scripts')` slot
- [ ] Sidebar: logo, nav links grouped by section (Dashboard, Employees, Attendance, Scheduling, Tasks, Leave, KPI, Reports, Settings); collapsible on mobile; active link highlight; role-scoped — hide links the user's role cannot access
- [ ] Topbar: company name + logo (left), company switcher dropdown (if multiple memberships), notification bell (placeholder badge), user avatar dropdown (Profile, 2FA Settings, Logout)
- [ ] Company switcher dropdown: lists all active company memberships; current company highlighted; switching POSTs to `/company/switch/{id}`
- [ ] Breadcrumb partial: `@include('partials.breadcrumb', ['crumbs' => [...]])`
- [ ] Flash message partial: success (green), error (red), warning (amber) — dismissible, auto-hides after 5s
- [ ] Page title `<title>` pattern: `{Page Title} — {Company Name} | Workforce OS`
- [ ] Mobile responsive: sidebar collapses to hamburger; overlay on open; swipe-to-close
- [ ] Empty state partial: `@include('partials.empty-state', ['icon' => ..., 'title' => ..., 'action' => ...])` — reused on every empty list

## Key files

- `resources/views/layouts/app.blade.php`
- `resources/views/partials/sidebar.blade.php`
- `resources/views/partials/topbar.blade.php`
- `resources/views/partials/breadcrumb.blade.php`
- `resources/views/partials/flash.blade.php`
- `resources/views/partials/empty-state.blade.php`

title: Phase 1b — Company Settings & Location CRUD
body:
Company profile management and physical location setup.

## Tasks

- [ ] Migrations: `locations` — `company_id`, `name`, `address`, `city`, `state`, `country`, `latitude`, `longitude`, `clock_in_radius` (default 100m), `is_active`, `qr_code` (unique token generated on creation)
- [ ] Migrations: `departments` — `company_id`, `location_id` (FK), `name`, `description`, `manager_id` (nullable FK → `employees`), `is_active`
- [ ] Company settings controller: update name, email, phone, industry, timezone, currency, date format, logo upload
- [ ] Location CRUD: create, edit, deactivate; `qr_code` auto-generated on creation; deactivating prevents clock-ins but retains history
- [ ] Department CRUD: create, edit, deactivate; scoped to a location; departments with active employees cannot be deleted — must deactivate
- [ ] Onboarding wizard: Step 1 company details → Step 2 first location → Step 3 first department → Step 4 invite HR manager

## Key files

- `database/migrations/*_create_locations_table.php`
- `database/migrations/*_create_departments_table.php`
- `app/Http/Controllers/Settings/CompanyController.php`
- `app/Http/Controllers/Settings/LocationController.php`
- `app/Http/Controllers/Settings/DepartmentController.php`

title: Phase 1b — UI: Settings Pages
body:
Settings section: company profile, locations, departments, and onboarding wizard.

## Tasks

**Company Settings (`/settings/company`)**
- [ ] Two-column layout: form left, logo preview right
- [ ] Logo upload: drag-and-drop or click; preview updates on file select; max 2MB
- [ ] Timezone and currency as searchable select dropdowns
- [ ] Save button with dirty-state detection (disabled when unchanged)

**Locations (`/settings/locations`)**
- [ ] Table: name, address, city, status badge, clock-in radius, action buttons
- [ ] Create/edit modal: address fields, lat/lng auto-populated via map click or postcode lookup (optional progressive enhancement); radius slider (50m–500m)
- [ ] Deactivate confirmation modal: warns about in-progress clock-ins
- [ ] Empty state: illustration + "Add your first location" CTA

**Departments (`/settings/departments`)**
- [ ] Table: name, location, manager, employee count, status badge, action buttons
- [ ] Create/edit modal: name, location (select), manager (employee search select)
- [ ] Deactivate guard: if department has active employees → show count, block deactivation with message

**Onboarding Wizard**
- [ ] Step indicator (1–4) at top; step validated before advancing
- [ ] Step 1: company details (inline with company settings form)
- [ ] Step 2: location form
- [ ] Step 3: department form
- [ ] Step 4: invite HR manager (email input) or "Skip for now"
- [ ] Completion: confetti + redirect to dashboard

## Key files

- `resources/views/settings/company.blade.php`
- `resources/views/settings/locations/`
- `resources/views/settings/departments/`
- `resources/views/onboarding/wizard.blade.php`

title: Phase 1c — Employee Directory & Profiles
body:
Core HR record covering the full employee lifecycle.

## Tasks

- [ ] Migration: `employees` — `company_id`, `user_id` (unique per company), `department_id`, `employee_number` (auto-generated), `first_name`, `last_name`, `phone`, `job_title`, `date_of_birth`, `gender`, `address`, `emergency_contact_name`, `emergency_contact_phone`, `employment_type`, `hire_date`, `end_date`, `status` (active/suspended/terminated), `basic_salary`, `pay_frequency`, `bank_name`, `account_number`, `account_name`, `tax_id`, `pension_pin`, `nhf_number`, `profile_photo`
- [ ] Migration: `employee_documents` — `company_id`, `employee_id`, `type`, `file_path`, `uploaded_at`
- [ ] Employee CRUD: full profile form with all fields; document uploads (offer letter, national ID, contract)
- [ ] Employee directory: searchable, filterable (department/location/status/employment type), sortable, export to CSV/Excel/PDF, per-page 10/25/50/100
- [ ] Employee profile — tabbed view: Summary, Documents, Attendance, KPI, Payslips, Leave, Tasks
- [ ] Employee status change: valid transitions Active ↔ Suspended, Active → Terminated, Suspended → Terminated; reason + effective date required; audit log
- [ ] Self-service profile edits: employee submits change request → `hr_manager` notified → approve or reject with reason

## Key files

- `database/migrations/*_create_employees_table.php`
- `app/Models/Employee.php`
- `app/Http/Controllers/Employee/EmployeeController.php`

title: Phase 1c — UI: Employee Directory & Profile
body:
Employee directory list view and full tabbed profile page.

## Tasks

**Directory (`/employees`)**
- [ ] Page header: title, "Add Employee" button (permission-gated), "Import CSV" button
- [ ] Filter bar: search input, department select, location select, status select, employment type select; "Clear filters" link
- [ ] Data table: avatar + name, employee number, department, job title, location, status badge (colored), hire date, action menu (View, Edit, Change Status)
- [ ] Per-page selector (10/25/50/100); pagination
- [ ] Export button: dropdown with CSV / Excel / PDF options
- [ ] Empty state: "No employees yet" with "Add Employee" CTA

**Add/Edit Employee (`/employees/create`, `/employees/{id}/edit`)**
- [ ] Multi-section form: Personal Information, Employment Details, Contact & Address, Emergency Contact, Payroll & Banking
- [ ] Profile photo upload with crop preview
- [ ] Department cascades from selected location
- [ ] Validation errors inline under each field

**Profile (`/employees/{id}`)**
- [ ] Hero card: photo, name, job title, department, status badge, employee number, hire date, quick-action buttons (Edit, Change Status)
- [ ] Tab navigation: Summary | Documents | Attendance | KPI | Payslips | Leave | Tasks
- [ ] Summary tab: all profile fields in read-only grid; edit opens inline or redirects to edit page
- [ ] Documents tab: upload button, document type select, file list with download links; delete confirmation
- [ ] Other tabs: show relevant data from their phases; empty state with "Available when [Phase Xn] is complete" placeholder until then
- [ ] Status change modal: transition select, reason textarea, effective date picker; confirmation required

## Key files

- `resources/views/employees/index.blade.php`
- `resources/views/employees/create.blade.php`
- `resources/views/employees/edit.blade.php`
- `resources/views/employees/show.blade.php`
- `resources/views/employees/partials/`

title: Phase 1c — CSV Bulk Import
body:
Bulk employee import for clients migrating from spreadsheets.

## Tasks

- [ ] CSV upload endpoint (`/employees/import`)
- [ ] Required columns: `first_name`, `last_name`, `email`, `phone`, `department`, `job_title`, `hire_date`
- [ ] Optional columns: all remaining employee fields
- [ ] Department resolved by name (case-insensitive)
- [ ] Maximum 500 rows per import
- [ ] For each row: same email-check invite logic as single employee creation
- [ ] Import report: total rows, succeeded count, failed count with per-row error reasons
- [ ] Queued as a background job for files > 50 rows

## Key files

- `app/Http/Controllers/Employee/EmployeeImportController.php`
- `app/Jobs/ImportEmployeesJob.php`

title: Phase 1c — Disciplinary Records & Offboarding
body:
Disciplinary record tracking and formal offboarding flow.

## Tasks

**Disciplinary Records**
- [ ] Migration: `disciplinary_records` — `company_id`, `employee_id`, `issued_by` (FK → `users`), `incident_date`, `type` (verbal_warning/written_warning/suspension/final_warning/termination), `description`, `suspension_end_date`, `attachment_path`
- [ ] CRUD from employee profile Disciplinary tab
- [ ] Visible to `super_admin`, `hr_manager`, `department_manager` (own dept only); employee can view own records read-only

**Offboarding**
- [ ] Initiate from employee profile: required fields — termination date, reason
- [ ] On confirm: set `employees.end_date` + `status = terminated`, invalidate user sessions, cancel future shift assignments, disable clock-in, flag for final payslip
- [ ] Audit log: actor, timestamp, reason
- [ ] Employee record becomes read-only after termination

## Key files

- `database/migrations/*_create_disciplinary_records_table.php`
- `app/Models/DisciplinaryRecord.php`
- `app/Http/Controllers/Employee/OffboardingController.php`

title: Phase 1d — GPS Clock-In & Attendance Backend
body:
GPS-based clock-in/out logic and real-time attendance data.

## Tasks

- [ ] Migration: `clock_ins` — `company_id`, `employee_id`, `shift_id` (nullable), `location_id` (nullable), `clocked_in_at`, `clocked_out_at`, `method` (gps/manual), coordinates, `gps_accuracy`, `approved_by`, `notes`, `is_late`, `late_minutes`, `status` (present/late/absent/half_day/overtime), `overtime_minutes`
- [ ] Clock-in endpoint (`/attendance/clock-in`): validate employee active, has department, GPS within `clock_in_radius` of any active location, GPS accuracy < 50m (reject if worse), no duplicate open session
- [ ] Clock-out: compute duration; if duration > shift duration → compute and store `overtime_minutes`
- [ ] Grace period: configurable per department (default 15 min); arrivals within grace = not late
- [ ] Manual clock-in (manager): select employee, time (today only, up to 4h in past), location, reason; batch mode for multiple employees; stored with `method = manual` + `approved_by`
- [ ] `MarkAbsentEmployeesJob`: runs at noon daily; marks absent if scheduled shift but no clock-in by 2h after shift start; skips employees with approved leave; notifies `department_manager`

## Key files

- `database/migrations/*_create_clock_ins_table.php`
- `app/Models/ClockIn.php`
- `app/Http/Controllers/Attendance/ClockInController.php`
- `app/Jobs/MarkAbsentEmployeesJob.php`

title: Phase 1d — UI: Attendance Dashboard & Clock-In
body:
Attendance monitoring pages and the employee clock-in interface.

## Tasks

**Attendance Dashboard (`/attendance`) — manager view**
- [ ] Summary stat cards: Clocked In Now, Late Today, Absent Today, Early Departures, Overtime Today
- [ ] "Currently Clocked In" live list: avatar, name, department, clocked-in time, running duration; refresh every 60s
- [ ] "Late Arrivals" list: name, department, clocked-in time, minutes late
- [ ] "Absent" list: name, department, scheduled shift; quick "Mark Manual" action
- [ ] Filter bar: location select, department select, date picker (defaults to today)
- [ ] Manual Clock-In modal: employee search, date/time picker (capped to now), location select, reason textarea; batch toggle (multi-employee select)

**Employee Clock-In (`/attendance/clock-in`) — employee view**
- [ ] Large clock-in/clock-out toggle button; current status (clocked in/out) prominent
- [ ] GPS status indicator: acquiring → ready (green) → rejected (red with reason: "GPS accuracy too low", "Outside location radius")
- [ ] Today's record: clocked in at, clocked out at, hours worked so far
- [ ] "My Schedule Today" mini card showing current shift

**Attendance History (`/attendance/history`)**
- [ ] Table: date, shift, clocked in, clocked out, duration, method badge (GPS/Manual/QR), status badge, overtime
- [ ] Date range filter; export CSV

**Timesheet (`/attendance/timesheet`) — hourly workers**
- [ ] Weekly grid: rows are days, columns are start/end/break/total/notes/status
- [ ] Inline add entry form; status badge per row (pending/approved/rejected)
- [ ] Manager approval view: list of pending entries with approve/reject bulk actions

## Key files

- `resources/views/attendance/dashboard.blade.php`
- `resources/views/attendance/clock-in.blade.php`
- `resources/views/attendance/history.blade.php`
- `resources/views/attendance/timesheet.blade.php`
- `resources/views/attendance/partials/`

title: Phase 1d — Timesheet (Hourly Workers)
body:
Time-entry logging for part-time and hourly workers not on shift schedules.

## Tasks

- [ ] Migration: `timesheets` — `company_id`, `employee_id`, `date`, `start_time`, `end_time`, `break_minutes`, `total_hours` (computed), `project`, `notes`, `status` (pending/approved/rejected), `approved_by`, `approved_at`
- [ ] Employee timesheet entry: date (no future dates, max 7 days in past), start time, end time, break duration, optional notes
- [ ] Submit for manager approval; manager approves/rejects with reason
- [ ] Manager batch approve/reject

## Key files

- `database/migrations/*_create_timesheets_table.php`
- `app/Models/Timesheet.php`
- `app/Http/Controllers/Attendance/TimesheetController.php`

title: Phase 1e — Shift Templates & Weekly Roster
body:
Shift template management and weekly roster scheduling.

## Tasks

- [ ] Migrations: `shifts` — `company_id`, `location_id`, `name`, `start_time`, `end_time`, `break_duration`, `color`, `required_employees`; overnight shifts supported (end_time < start_time)
- [ ] Migration: `shift_assignments` — `company_id`, `employee_id`, `shift_id`, `date`, `start_time`, `end_time`, `break_duration`, `status` (confirmed/pending_swap/cancelled), swap fields, `is_published`
- [ ] Shift templates CRUD: named reusable patterns per location
- [ ] Weekly roster controller: assign, update, remove, bulk assign
- [ ] Conflict detection: warn if employee already has overlapping shift
- [ ] Draft vs published: draft visible to managers only; publish → notify all assigned employees

## Key files

- `database/migrations/*_create_shifts_table.php`
- `database/migrations/*_create_shift_assignments_table.php`
- `app/Models/Shift.php`, `app/Models/ShiftAssignment.php`
- `app/Http/Controllers/Schedule/RosterController.php`

title: Phase 1e — UI: Scheduling Roster & Shift Management
body:
Shift template library, drag-and-drop weekly roster, and employee schedule view.

## Tasks

**Shift Templates (`/scheduling/shifts`)**
- [ ] Card grid: shift name, time range, color swatch, location, break, required count; edit and delete actions
- [ ] Create/edit modal: name, location (select), start time, end time, break duration, color picker (predefined palette), required employees count
- [ ] Overnight shift support: end time < start time shown as "Day +1"

**Weekly Roster (`/scheduling/roster`)**
- [ ] Grid: rows = employees, columns = 7 days (Mon–Sun); week navigation arrows + date picker
- [ ] Filter bar: department select, location select
- [ ] Cell: shows assigned shift chip (colored, shift name + time); empty cell shows "+" on hover
- [ ] Click cell → modal: assign shift template (searchable select), or clear assignment; bulk mode (checkbox select employees → assign same shift)
- [ ] Conflict warning: cell highlighted red if overlapping assignment detected
- [ ] Draft / Publish toggle: draft indicator banner at top; Publish button → confirmation modal listing affected employees + notification count

**Employee Schedule (`/schedule/my-schedule`)**
- [ ] Week view: current week + 2 weeks ahead; each shift as a card (time, location, status)
- [ ] Status badges: Confirmed (green), Pending swap (amber), Cancelled (grey)
- [ ] "Request swap" button on upcoming confirmed shifts

**Shift Swap**
- [ ] Swap request form: select target employee from department list, note
- [ ] Target employee sees pending swap notification → Accept / Decline
- [ ] Manager view: pending swaps awaiting approval (if company setting requires it)

**Coverage Analytics (`/scheduling/coverage`)**
- [ ] Table: shift, date, required employees, assigned count, fill rate %; red highlight for < 100%
- [ ] Schedule adherence metric: % of assigned who clocked in within grace period

## Key files

- `resources/views/schedule/shifts.blade.php`
- `resources/views/schedule/roster.blade.php`
- `resources/views/schedule/my-schedule.blade.php`
- `resources/views/schedule/coverage.blade.php`

title: Phase 1e — Shift Swap & Coverage Analytics
body:
Employee-initiated shift swaps and schedule coverage reporting.

## Tasks

**Shift Swap**
- [ ] Employee selects future shift → requests swap → selects target employee
- [ ] Target employee notified → accepts or rejects; no response in 48h → swap expires
- [ ] Manager approval optional (company setting); on approval → both assignments updated

**Coverage Analytics**
- [ ] Shift fill rate: % of shifts with at least one assigned employee
- [ ] Coverage gaps: shifts below `required_employees` count
- [ ] Schedule adherence: % of assigned employees who clocked in within grace period

## Key files

- `app/Http/Controllers/Schedule/ShiftSwapController.php`

title: Phase 1f — Task Management Backend
body:
Task CRUD, checklists, comments, and escalation job.

## Tasks

- [ ] Migrations: `tasks` — `company_id`, `created_by`, `assigned_to` (FK → `employees`), `department_id`, `location_id`, `title`, `description`, `due_date`, `priority` (low/medium/high/urgent), `status` (todo/in_progress/review/done), `completed_at`, `escalation_status`
- [ ] Migration: `task_checklists` — `task_id`, `title`, `is_completed`, `sort_order`
- [ ] Migration: `task_comments` — `task_id`, `user_id`, `body`
- [ ] Task CRUD: all fields; bulk assign — same task cloned for multiple employees at once
- [ ] Status transitions; manager can re-assign, change due date at any time
- [ ] `EscalateOverdueTasksJob`: flags overdue tasks, updates `escalation_status`, notifies assigning manager

## Key files

- `database/migrations/*_create_tasks_table.php`
- `database/migrations/*_create_task_checklists_table.php`
- `database/migrations/*_create_task_comments_table.php`
- `app/Models/Task.php`, `app/Models/TaskChecklist.php`, `app/Models/TaskComment.php`
- `app/Http/Controllers/Task/TaskController.php`
- `app/Jobs/EscalateOverdueTasksJob.php`

title: Phase 1f — UI: Kanban Task Board
body:
Kanban board for manager task view and simplified list view for employees.

## Tasks

**Kanban Board (`/tasks`) — manager / hr_manager / super_admin**
- [ ] Four columns: To Do, In Progress, Review, Done; column task count badge
- [ ] Task card: title, assignee avatar, priority badge (color-coded), due date (red if overdue), checklist progress (x/total), escalation indicator
- [ ] Drag-and-drop between columns (status update on drop via AJAX)
- [ ] Filter bar: assignee select, priority select, department select, overdue toggle
- [ ] "Create Task" button → slide-over panel: title, description, assignee (employee search), department, due date, priority; "Bulk Assign" toggle (multi-select employees → task cloned per employee)

**Task Detail Slide-over / Modal**
- [ ] Full task details: all fields editable inline by manager
- [ ] Checklist section: add items, check/uncheck, reorder by drag
- [ ] Comments thread: textarea + submit; chronological list with avatar, name, timestamp
- [ ] Activity log: status changes, reassignments (compact list at bottom)

**My Tasks (`/tasks/my-tasks`) — employee view**
- [ ] Simple list grouped by status; overdue tasks at top with red border
- [ ] Quick "Mark as Done" action on each card
- [ ] Task detail: same slide-over (read-only for assignment fields; employee can comment and check checklist items)

## Key files

- `resources/views/tasks/index.blade.php`
- `resources/views/tasks/my-tasks.blade.php`
- `resources/views/tasks/partials/card.blade.php`
- `resources/views/tasks/partials/detail.blade.php`

title: Phase 1g — Executive Dashboard
depends_on: Phase 1e — UI: Scheduling Roster & Shift Management
body:
Role-scoped home screen with real-time operational metrics and charts.

## Tasks

**Backend (DashboardController)**
- [ ] `super_admin` / `hr_manager` queries: total headcount, present/absent/late counts, open task count, pending leave requests count, recent hires (last 30d), birthdays in next 7d, 7-day attendance trend data, task completion rate data
- [ ] `department_manager` queries: same but scoped to own department(s)
- [ ] `employee` queries: today's shift assignment, own open/overdue task count, own leave balance summary, next 3 shift assignments

**UI — `super_admin` / `hr_manager` view**
- [ ] Stat cards row: Total Headcount, Present Today, Absent Today, Late Arrivals, Open Tasks, Pending Approvals
- [ ] Payroll summary card: current month gross/deductions/net (placeholder text until Phase 3b)
- [ ] Pending approvals card: leave requests + shift swaps with quick approve/reject links
- [ ] Upcoming birthdays widget: avatars + names + days until
- [ ] Recent hires widget: name, job title, department, hire date
- [ ] Attendance trend line chart (7-day) — ApexCharts
- [ ] Task completion donut chart — ApexCharts

**UI — `department_manager` view**
- [ ] Same layout, all data scoped to own department; no payroll card

**UI — `employee` view**
- [ ] Today's shift card: shift name, time, location; "Clock In" shortcut button
- [ ] My Tasks summary: open count, overdue count; link to `/tasks/my-tasks`
- [ ] Leave balance mini-table: leave type, allocated, used, remaining
- [ ] Upcoming shifts list (next 3)

## Key files

- `app/Http/Controllers/DashboardController.php`
- `resources/views/dashboard/index.blade.php`
- `resources/views/dashboard/partials/`

title: Phase 2a — Leave Management Backend
body:
Leave request and approval workflow with configurable leave types and balance tracking.

## Tasks

- [ ] Migration: `leave_types` — `company_id`, `name`, `slug`, `default_days`, `is_paid`, `requires_document`; seed 8 defaults (Annual 21d, Sick 7d, Casual 5d, Maternity 90d, Paternity 14d, Study 10d, Bereavement 5d, Unpaid configurable)
- [ ] Migration: `leave_balances` — `company_id`, `employee_id`, `leave_type_id`, `allocated`, `used`, `pending`, `year`
- [ ] Migration: `leave_requests` — `company_id`, `employee_id`, `leave_type_id`, `approved_by`, `start_date`, `end_date`, `duration`, `reason`, `status` (pending/approved/rejected/cancelled), `rejection_reason`, `approved_at`
- [ ] Leave request submission: calculate working days, validate balance, block weekends/public holidays
- [ ] Approval flow: employee → `department_manager` → `hr_manager` (configurable skip levels)
- [ ] `super_admin` and `hr_manager` can manually adjust any employee's balance (reason required, audit logged)
- [ ] iCal export of approved leave

## Key files

- `database/migrations/*_create_leave_types_table.php`
- `database/migrations/*_create_leave_balances_table.php`
- `database/migrations/*_create_leave_requests_table.php`
- `app/Http/Controllers/LeaveController.php`

title: Phase 2a — UI: Leave Management Pages
body:
Leave request, approval inbox, balance overview, and company leave calendar.

## Tasks

**My Leave (`/leave`) — employee view**
- [ ] Balance summary cards: one per leave type (allocated / used / remaining)
- [ ] "Request Leave" button → modal: leave type select (shows remaining balance inline), date range picker (weekends greyed out), reason textarea, document upload (shown if leave type requires it)
- [ ] My requests table: type, dates, duration, status badge (pending/approved/rejected), submitted date; cancel action on pending requests

**Approval Inbox (`/leave/approvals`) — manager view**
- [ ] Pending requests list: employee name + avatar, leave type, dates, duration, days remaining in balance
- [ ] Approve / Reject actions inline; reject requires reason
- [ ] Approved and historical tabs

**Leave Calendar (`/leave/calendar`)**
- [ ] Month/week/day toggle; color-coded by leave type
- [ ] Filter: department, location, leave type
- [ ] Approved leave blocks shown as event bars with employee name
- [ ] Shift coverage warning: indicator when a scheduled employee has approved leave on a shift day
- [ ] iCal export button

**Leave Administration (`/leave/admin`) — `hr_manager` / `super_admin`**
- [ ] Leave type CRUD: name, default days, paid toggle, document required toggle
- [ ] Balance override: select employee → leave type → adjust allocated days + reason
- [ ] Audit log tab: history of all manual adjustments

## Key files

- `resources/views/leave/index.blade.php`
- `resources/views/leave/approvals.blade.php`
- `resources/views/leave/calendar.blade.php`
- `resources/views/leave/admin.blade.php`

title: Phase 2b — KPI Metrics & Scoring Backend
body:
Configurable KPI definitions with traffic-light scoring and performance review scorecard.

## Tasks

- [ ] Migration: `kpi_metrics` — `company_id`, `name`, `description`, `unit`, `target_value`, `weight`, `frequency` (daily/weekly/monthly/quarterly), `department_id`, `green_threshold` (default 90%), `amber_threshold` (default 70%), `is_active`
- [ ] Migration: `kpi_scores` — `company_id`, `kpi_metric_id`, `employee_id`, `scored_by`, `score`, `score_percentage`, `traffic_light` (green/amber/red), `period_start`, `period_end`, `notes`
- [ ] KPI definition CRUD: `super_admin` / `hr_manager` only; configurable thresholds per metric
- [ ] KPI scoring: manager enters scores; traffic-light computed on save; each score saved as new history row
- [ ] Composite score: `sum(score_percentage × weight) / sum(weight)`
- [ ] Performance review workflow: HR initiates period → scores aggregated → scorecard PDF generated → HR publishes → employees notified

## Key files

- `database/migrations/*_create_kpi_metrics_table.php`
- `database/migrations/*_create_kpi_scores_table.php`
- `app/Http/Controllers/Kpi/KpiController.php`
- `app/Actions/Kpi/GeneratePerformanceScorecard.php`

title: Phase 2b — UI: KPI Dashboard & Scoring
body:
KPI definition management, scoring matrix, and performance dashboard.

## Tasks

**KPI Metrics Admin (`/kpi/metrics`) — `hr_manager` / `super_admin`**
- [ ] Table: metric name, unit, target, weight, frequency, department, thresholds, active toggle
- [ ] Create/edit modal: all fields; threshold sliders for green/amber
- [ ] Deactivate confirmation: warns if metric has scores in current period

**Scoring Matrix (`/kpi/score/{department}`)**
- [ ] Grid: rows = employees, columns = active KPI metrics for the department
- [ ] Each cell: score input (number); on save → score_percentage computed, traffic-light dot shown (green/amber/red)
- [ ] Row footer: composite score per employee
- [ ] Period selector (month/quarter) at top
- [ ] Save all button (batch upsert)

**KPI Dashboard (`/kpi`)**
- [ ] Summary: top 5 performers, bottom 5 performers (by composite score)
- [ ] Per-employee trend: sparkline for last 12 periods
- [ ] Department comparison bar chart (average composite by dept) — ApexCharts
- [ ] Filter: department, period range
- [ ] Export CSV / PDF

**Employee KPI Tab (on Profile)**
- [ ] KPI scores table: metric, period, score, traffic-light, notes
- [ ] Overall composite score badge

**Performance Scorecard PDF**
- [ ] Company logo, employee name/photo, review period
- [ ] Per-KPI row: metric name, target, score, traffic-light dot
- [ ] Overall composite score, manager comments field, employee acknowledgement signature line

## Key files

- `resources/views/kpi/metrics.blade.php`
- `resources/views/kpi/score.blade.php`
- `resources/views/kpi/dashboard.blade.php`
- `resources/views/kpi/scorecard-pdf.blade.php`

title: Phase 2c — QR Clock-In & Token Rotation
body:
QR code clock-in as primary method for fixed-location businesses with secure token rotation.

## Tasks

- [ ] QR token is a signed JWT: `{location_id, issued_at, expires_at, signature}`
- [ ] QR display page (`/attendance/qr-display/{location}`): full-screen; auto-refreshes on rotation interval
- [ ] QR scan clock-in (`/attendance/qr-scan`): employee scans QR on phone; server validates token + same rules as GPS clock-in; record created with `method = qr`
- [ ] Token rotation: configurable per location (1h / 6h / 24h / 7d / never; default 24h); 5-minute grace period
- [ ] Manual regen: manager forces new QR (invalidates current token)

## Key files

- `app/Http/Controllers/Attendance/QrController.php`
- `app/Actions/Attendance/GenerateQrToken.php`
- `resources/views/attendance/qr-display.blade.php`

title: Phase 2d — Reports & Analytics
body:
Exportable reports and trend analytics across all major modules.

## Tasks

- [ ] Headcount summary: department, location, status filters
- [ ] Attendance summary: date range, department, location, employee filters
- [ ] Leave utilization: year, department, leave type filters
- [ ] KPI performance: period, department, employee filters
- [ ] Task completion: status, priority, department filters
- [ ] Timesheet summary: date range, employee, department filters
- [ ] Disciplinary records: date range, department, type filters
- [ ] Turnover rate: hires and terminations over a period
- [ ] Export formats: CSV, Excel (.xlsx), PDF — all reports

## Key files

- `app/Http/Controllers/ReportController.php`
- `app/Exports/`

title: Phase 2d — UI: Reports & Analytics Pages
body:
Report index, individual report views, and analytics charts.

## Tasks

**Reports Index (`/reports`)**
- [ ] Card grid: one card per report (icon, title, description, "Run Report" CTA)
- [ ] Reports: Headcount, Attendance Summary, Leave Utilization, KPI Performance, Task Completion, Timesheet Summary, Disciplinary Records, Turnover Rate

**Report View (shared pattern)**
- [ ] Filter bar at top (filters vary per report; see backend issue)
- [ ] "Run" button re-fetches; results shown in a data table
- [ ] Export bar: CSV / Excel / PDF buttons; PDF opens in new tab
- [ ] Empty state when no data for selected filters

**Analytics Page (`/reports/analytics`)**
- [ ] Date range picker (default: last 30 days)
- [ ] Attendance trend area chart — ApexCharts
- [ ] Task completion rate over time — line chart
- [ ] KPI composite by department — bar chart
- [ ] Drill-down: click a bar/point → filtered table of constituent rows below chart

## Key files

- `resources/views/reports/index.blade.php`
- `resources/views/reports/show.blade.php`
- `resources/views/reports/analytics.blade.php`

title: Phase 2e — Subscription & Company Creation Gating
body:
Moves company creation from free (Phase 1 dev bypass) to subscription-gated.

## Tasks

- [ ] Subscription plans: Starter (₦25K/month, 50 seats), Growth (₦75K/month, 200 seats), Enterprise (custom)
- [ ] Gate company creation behind active subscription or trial period (`trial_ends_at`)
- [ ] Subscription management controller: current plan, seats used, renewal date, upgrade/downgrade
- [ ] Trial expiry: soft-lock features on expiry; notify 7 days before
- [ ] `system_admin` panel: view all companies with plan and seat usage; enable/disable companies
- [ ] Paystack integration for subscription billing
- [ ] `EnsureActiveSubscription` middleware applied to all tenant routes

## Key files

- `app/Http/Controllers/SubscriptionController.php`
- `app/Http/Middleware/EnsureActiveSubscription.php`

title: Phase 2e — UI: Subscription & Billing Pages
body:
Subscription management for company admins and the system admin company overview.

## Tasks

**Subscription Page (`/settings/subscription`) — `super_admin`**
- [ ] Current plan card: plan name, seats used / total, renewal date, monthly cost
- [ ] Upgrade/downgrade plan: plan comparison table (features, seat limit, price per seat); Paystack checkout integration
- [ ] Trial banner: shown on every page when in trial; countdown days remaining
- [ ] Expired plan: full-page soft-lock screen with upgrade CTA; only super_admin can access billing

**System Admin Panel (`/sysadmin/companies`)**
- [ ] Table: company name, plan, seats used, trial_ends_at, is_active toggle
- [ ] Enable/disable company (soft-lock all memberships)
- [ ] Search by company name or email

## Key files

- `resources/views/settings/subscription.blade.php`
- `resources/views/sysadmin/companies.blade.php`

title: Phase 3a — Internal Chat Backend
body:
Channel-based and direct messaging powered by Laravel Reverb WebSockets.

## Tasks

- [ ] Migrations: `chat_channels` — `company_id`, `name`, `type` (public/private/dm/announcement), `is_dm`, `created_by`
- [ ] Migration: `chat_channel_user` — pivot: `channel_id`, `user_id`, `last_read_at`
- [ ] Migration: `chat_messages` — `company_id`, `channel_id`, `user_id`, `message`, `type` (text/image/file/system/voice_note), `attachment_path`, `attachment_name`, `attachment_size`, `edited_at`
- [ ] Auto-create `#general` channel on company creation; department channels on department creation
- [ ] Channel messaging: text, emoji reactions, file/image attachments (5MB), voice notes (2-min max)
- [ ] Edit own message within 5 minutes; delete own messages; `@mention` with notification
- [ ] Read receipts: sent/delivered/read
- [ ] Message history search
- [ ] Direct messaging: one-to-one between any two users in the same company
- [ ] Real-time delivery: Laravel Reverb WebSockets; message persisted before broadcast; offline messages on reconnect
- [ ] Migration: `announcements` — `company_id`, `created_by`, `title`, `content`, `audience_type`, `audience_id`, `is_urgent`, `pinned_until`

## Key files

- `database/migrations/*_create_chat_channels_table.php`
- `database/migrations/*_create_chat_messages_table.php`
- `database/migrations/*_create_announcements_table.php`
- `app/Models/ChatChannel.php`, `app/Models/ChatMessage.php`
- `app/Http/Controllers/Chat/ChatController.php`
- `app/Events/MessageSent.php`

title: Phase 3a — UI: Chat Interface
body:
Slack-style chat interface integrated into the app shell.

## Tasks

**Layout**
- [ ] Chat occupies full main content area; no standard page breadcrumb
- [ ] Left panel (200px): channel list sections — Company Channels, Department Channels, Direct Messages; unread count badges; "New DM" button at bottom
- [ ] Right panel: message thread area + message composer
- [ ] Responsive: on mobile, left panel is a bottom drawer

**Channel / DM Thread**
- [ ] Messages grouped by date ("Today", "Yesterday", date)
- [ ] Message row: avatar, display name, timestamp, message body; hover → reaction picker + reply + edit + delete actions
- [ ] Edited messages show "(edited)" label
- [ ] Emoji reactions: emoji + count chip; click to add/remove own reaction
- [ ] File/image attachment: image thumbnail inline; file shows name + size + download icon
- [ ] Voice note: audio player bar (play/pause, progress, duration)
- [ ] Read receipts: "Seen by N" shown below last message in DMs
- [ ] Unread separator: "--- X new messages ---" bar on channel open

**Message Composer**
- [ ] Expanding textarea; Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline
- [ ] Toolbar icons: emoji picker, attach file, record voice note
- [ ] `@mention` autocomplete: type `@` → dropdown of channel members
- [ ] Uploading: progress bar; cancel option
- [ ] Voice recording: hold-to-record UI; waveform animation; max 2 minutes

**Announcements Feed (`/announcements`)**
- [ ] Separate from chat; chronological list
- [ ] Urgent announcements pinned to top with red border
- [ ] Create announcement form (hr_manager / super_admin): title, content (rich text), audience (all/department/location), urgent toggle, pin until date

## Key files

- `resources/views/chat/index.blade.php`
- `resources/views/chat/partials/`
- `resources/views/announcements/index.blade.php`

title: Phase 3b — Payroll Engine Backend
body:
Nigerian-compliant payroll engine: PAYE, pension, NHF, and disbursement via Paystack/Flutterwave.

## Tasks

- [ ] Migration: `payroll_runs` — `company_id`, `period`, `period_start`, `period_end`, `frequency`, `total_gross`, `total_deductions`, `total_net`, `status` (draft/completed/paid/cancelled), `paid_at`, `processed_by`
- [ ] Migration: `payslips` — `company_id`, `payroll_run_id`, `employee_id`, `earnings` (JSON), `deductions` (JSON), `gross_pay`, `total_deductions`, `net_pay`, `status`, `payment_reference`, `paid_at`
- [ ] Payroll component config per company: earning types and deduction types
- [ ] Payroll run flow: draft → review → approve → disburse
- [ ] PAYE: 2026 Nigeria Tax Act bands + CRA formula (`max(₦200K, gross×1%) + gross×20%`)
- [ ] NHF: 2.5% of basic; pension employee: 8% of gross; pension employer: 10% of gross
- [ ] Overtime pulled from `clock_ins.overtime_minutes` for period
- [ ] HR can adjust individual components (reason required); on approval: run locked, payslips generated
- [ ] PDF payslip: employee info, period, itemised earnings, deductions, net, YTD totals
- [ ] Disbursement: batch CSV or Paystack/Flutterwave bulk transfer API; reconciliation after callbacks

## Key files

- `database/migrations/*_create_payroll_runs_table.php`
- `database/migrations/*_create_payslips_table.php`
- `app/Actions/Payroll/ComputePayrollRun.php`
- `app/Actions/Payroll/ComputePaye.php`
- `app/Jobs/GeneratePayslipsJob.php`

title: Phase 3b — UI: Payroll Management Pages
body:
Payroll run management, line-item review, and employee payslip view.

## Tasks

**Payroll Runs (`/payroll`) — `hr_manager` / `super_admin`**
- [ ] Runs list: period, frequency, status badge (Draft/Approved/Paid/Cancelled), totals (gross/net), processed by, action buttons
- [ ] "New Payroll Run" button → modal: period (month), frequency (monthly/bi-weekly/weekly)
- [ ] Status pipeline banner on run detail: Draft → Reviewing → Approved → Disbursed (step indicators)

**Run Detail (`/payroll/{run}`)**
- [ ] Summary cards: Total Gross, Total Deductions, Total Net, Employees
- [ ] Payslip table: employee name, basic, allowances, gross, PAYE, pension, NHF, other deductions, net pay; editable cells (manager adjustment) with reason field
- [ ] Export full run as Excel
- [ ] "Approve Run" button → confirmation modal showing totals; locks run
- [ ] "Disburse" button → choose method (CSV download / Paystack bulk) → confirmation
- [ ] Reconciliation table after disburse: employee, amount, status (paid/failed/pending), retry action on failed

**My Payslips (`/payroll/my-payslips`) — employee**
- [ ] List of payslips sorted by period descending; status badge (Paid)
- [ ] View payslip → full itemised breakdown in modal
- [ ] Download PDF button per payslip

**Payroll Components (`/settings/payroll`) — `super_admin`**
- [ ] Earning types CRUD: name, type (fixed/percentage/overtime), taxable toggle
- [ ] Deduction types CRUD: name, statutory toggle (PAYE/pension/NHF are locked)

## Key files

- `resources/views/payroll/index.blade.php`
- `resources/views/payroll/show.blade.php`
- `resources/views/payroll/my-payslips.blade.php`
- `resources/views/payroll/payslip-pdf.blade.php`
- `resources/views/settings/payroll.blade.php`

title: Phase 3c — REST API
body:
API layer for the mobile app and future integrations. Sanctum table already exists from Phase 1a.

## Tasks

- [ ] Configure Laravel Sanctum `auth:sanctum` middleware; token scopes: `attendance:write`, `profile:read`, `schedule:read`, `tasks:write`
- [ ] `POST /api/v1/auth/login` — returns scoped bearer token
- [ ] `POST /api/v1/auth/logout` — revokes current token
- [ ] API Resources: UserResource, EmployeeResource, ClockInResource, ShiftAssignmentResource, TaskResource
- [ ] `GET /api/v1/me` — current user profile + active company
- [ ] `POST /api/v1/attendance/clock-in` — GPS clock-in
- [ ] `POST /api/v1/attendance/clock-out` — GPS clock-out
- [ ] `GET /api/v1/attendance/history` — paginated
- [ ] `GET /api/v1/schedule` — upcoming shift assignments
- [ ] `GET /api/v1/tasks` — assigned tasks
- [ ] `POST /api/v1/tasks/{id}/status` — update task status
- [ ] Rate limiting: 60 req/min authenticated, 30 unauthenticated; `X-RateLimit-*` + `Retry-After` headers
- [ ] Response envelope: `{ success, data, message, meta }` via API Resources

## Key files

- `routes/api.php`
- `app/Http/Controllers/Api/V1/`
- `app/Http/Resources/`
